segments.text: Today is a very important day in our lives as Sahajyogis.
This the Day when Sahasrara was opened out, which
really a very charismatic thing that happened
I never expected
That In my lifetime i will be able to work it
it has been, and so many of you have got your Sahastrara opened.
Without that You could never had known what is the truth?
We were all lost as everybody else was!
First off-all, Sahasrara is only way we can perceive understand
and know the reality.
You have come to know as
what is the reality
And you are enjoying that state
where,you know
What Is The Reality
It's a great blessing
That Sahasrara was opened out
All of your got your realization
Otherwise all talks
Are just talks
Has no meaning
has no understanding and that's why my first anxiety was to open Sahasrara. That worked
out, it worked well! And all of you have got your Sahasrara opened. It is a remarkable
thing – nobody can believe so many people who've got their Sahasrara opened but
But I can see now clearly the light on top of your heads.
Whatever you have achieved is remarkable, no doubt!
It's because honest searching that we've got it – my doings are nothing
Because You were just there like a lamp and I just enlightened it
That' all
It's not such a big thing to do, as you people have achieved your state of enlightenment.
That You got it because we were hankering after it – working out and We did that!
It's very creditable.
Credit doesn't go to Me, I think because i had an open Sahasrara but to achieve that
in you people was so joy giving for me now You will understand Because if Sahastra is
not opened ,you can talk with People .You cant say anything to them it just they don
With the Sahastrara open, your understanding improves so much.
That is what has happened with all of you and I am very happy that there are many people
sitting here who have got their Sahasranas opened
And they're a lot more than we've had.
So it's big achievement for human beings to get it so much collectively – Sahasrara
open, by which you know the truth.
Absolute Truth – whatever is known after your realization it's the absolute truth
. You don't argue then ,don´t question …you just know and accept as a knowledge
It's such a nice thing that it was all there, but it wasn't open and when it opened out
how people have understood Me.
And also the laws of The Divine!
Its' Such A Blessing Of The Divine That You Have Got Your Sastra Opened Out For
Which You May Say We Didn't Do Anything Other Is Not So.
Your search for truth was intense and definite.
You wanted to know the Truth, that's why it has worked out otherwise no amount of money
No Amount Of Effort nothing would have helped so Sahasrara had to open by itself
It is all your building up I should say
It's all you have done, doing to yourself that has brought forth such a beautiful happening.
I do not take any credit for it at all!
Definitely i must say
That is made me understand
That it's important that your Sahasrara should be opened.
No more arguments, no more suggestions – nothing but have your own Sahasra open which tells
you what is the truth.
In these beautiful circumstances…
What could Your Mother say?
I can only say that continue to live a life of reality,
and understanding.
In everything you will find there is truth
And how do we use the truth
Is our own achievement
People are lost because they have no knowledge
Knowledge from the books is no knowledge, their knowledge must come
within themselves and that has happened because of Swasrara opening.
In all countries it's happened
And will be in whole world so many people get realization
But only thing I feel
That you people should have no emotional attachment to it, not emotional but realistic
attachment that is there.
It has happened and its working out then we will be able
To give realizations other
You'll understand the importance of realization
Unless and until you use it,
You won't know what is the power of Realization is.
So
we must learn how to Use this Power
which Is within YOU
Which has started working out
And will give you such an immense capacity
My health a little bit gone down after all I am very old
But still
I don't feel tired in any way while addressing you.
But,I feel so enamoured that there are
So many Sahaja Yogis
who's Sastrara is open
and they're enjoying their Sastra
Actually i would have liked to ask Me questions
but You can write questions
send me written ones
then ill try answer them sometime
will be a much better idea.
So thank you very much, may God bless you!
Grow into Sahaj, grow in to your being
May god bless all my blessings
We want invite the 25 children between 5 and 10 years old
please come on stage for Ganesha Puja

Ganesha?
Ok let us take three times Sri Ganeshas mantra please
So with the permission of Sri Mataji, we are now going to read 51 stanzas in the praise
of our Divine Mother, and you are all invited to say salutations
again after each stanza.
You're the one primordial being,
The source for creation.
You're mother of three murtis
And their respective shakti's
You're mistress of Manidwipa
The island of Yadi Shakti
You've the Virata
The universal body of God
in which all possible planes of existence are manifest and interacting.
You're the macrocosmic household or creation
And you' re a primordial mother who rules over it with complete control
Everything originates from YOU when you breathe out
everything returns to you, when you breathed in
Your divine attention vibrates as waves through the universes
and carries all information and knowledge.
Your nirananda fills creation with marvelous beauty
and manifests as a silent promise,
your motherly love pulsates through the rivers
of existence moving gently
With rhythm of Lord Shiva's Dhamaru
you counsel comfort
And redeem
The endless stream
Of souls evolving in
In cool flame
of your desire.
From Your most worshipful feet flow endless rivers
Of Chaitanya generously penetrating every atom
With divinity, with Your soft-skinned hands
You command the flow of Chaitanya as well
As armies of heavenly beings
from Your beautiful deep eyes flows majestic grace
Coronating The object of sight
with value and meaning.
Your smile is a rainbow of assurance
in comfort, its splendid colors are expressions
over love and kindness beyond human description
the many expression of your perfect face
our conducting the playful dance
or The Five Elements
You're words always in tune
With reality at moment
They flowing from you as manifestations
of truth and love, and thus compose endless Bhagavad Gitas each
which is charged with the power not only
most precious information but immediate subtle effect on
listener. Calling someone by his name sends waves
joy through being and accommodates
his restless heart with motherly comfort.
Putting your most benevolent attention
on someone, however far away will bestow bliss
upon him and fill his longing cups with living waters.
Having dreamt of you during the night
we'll transform that day into a sunset walk
through The Gardens Of Eden hand-in-hand
With my image as Heavenly Mother
Your Darshan whether physical or subtle
Or in your dreams is never without result
And blessing it's always transforming
and joyful. In a yogi you are the desire of liberation,
You're The instrument Of Liberation
And You Are Liberation Itself
.You Are The Highest Object
Of Meditation As You Represent everything
A Yogi Can Achieve
You Reside Within Us
as The Ultimate Personality
Of Truth Being Existence
Which Reveals Itself To us
Once We Release All False Concepts
and identifications.
You reside within us as the mistress of Sahasrara who will make
us into universal beings once you have granted
us permanent citizenship in your kingdom.
Concentrating on you cleanses
The Chakras Of The Yogi, purifies his desire
And enlightens
His attention.
Meditating upon
You causes
The Kundalini to rise
the cool vibrations to flow, and
awareness become collective at the level of Sahasrara.
Singing your praise
And offering puja
To your lotus feet
Is answered with rivers
Of chaitanya
In which we get purified
And elated
The state
Of Satchitananda
When We make
The endless silence
Of sahasrara
Resound
With Your three great mantras
You shower upon us
Heavenly nectar
from Your Horn of Plenty, filling us with ecstatic well-being.
Identifying With You will grant self realization as you are the Atma
and God's realization that you're the Paramatma
Dissolving into your being
Will grant eternal life in The Gardens Of Devi Loka
And Company of Gods & Goddesses
With your presence, you can give self-realization to one person
or 50 thousand or the whole world alike.
You gave Self realization
To human beings by embracing them into your universal being
which is One Ocean of Chaitanya
.You develop and manifest Self realization in the Sahaja Yogis
By processing themselves as cells in your universal body
which is like a lingam of cool fire without beginning nor end.
Ultimately, you grant the yogis
at place in your Sahasrara
where allow them access to
continuous flow or heavenly nectar
It's because we are cells
In new universal body
that feel instant flow of vibrations
once focus our attention on You
Because We are cells
New Universal Body
that we feel vibrations when are with other Sahaja Yogis.
Our spiritual growth is in your hands,
as were cells of our universal body
We can only evolve collectively within the Mariyadas
or your divine being
We integrate into you a Universal Being
The Parabrahma
through surrender and recognizing
Your omnipotent nature
Taking us to your Universal Being
Is an act
Of love & compassion
sacrificing until total self-denial, as you have opened the doors to everyone without distinction.
Of all gods and goddesses it is only the Primordial Mother who has
The powers To master this monumental task of collective redemption
And enlightenment which Has nothing equal in the history
Being that You are the avatar of Sahasrara Chakra
You are the first divine incarnation
addressing to whole world beyond nationality, race and language.
you're a guru of global village
residing at top of Tower of Babel
liberating mankind from curse distinction
in creating an integrated global body
man
using controlling scientific achievements
modern days
establish spread your worldwide presence
You are the first and only female avatar,
And you have established your universal living religion single-handed all over
The world in worst of all yugas.
The story of Nirmala born in Chindwara on March 21st
In 1923 is a story God Mother having incarnated
On this earth for purpose of completing greatest task
Single human being has ever undertaken
You have conquered the whole world with your power of love and you have transformed
their lives, hundreds or thousands
With compassion in kindness. No avatar before
has had a comparable impact on the spiritual awareness
mankind being that you are only incarnation
who is delivered complete system knowledge
instrument technique and the power to awaken it
to a living integrated process of spiritual transformation.
It is your negativity destroying presence on this planet
that ends the Kali Yuga because you awaken man
from his slumber
or sinful ignorance and false knowledge,
it's your auspicious presence
On This Planet That Is The Krita Yuga
Because Your Most Powerful Innocence
Steers Up The Collective Unconscious
And Brings All Impurity To The Surface
It is Your Divine Presence on this planet that heralds the Satya Yuga
because You have given birth to a new man who lives in unity with God,
nature and his fellow brothers & sisters.
It is your name, Shri Mataji Nirmala Devi
that will shine like a million suns on the future of mankind.

Shemata is in front of us.

space here so that people can pass by?
And all the country representatives
who want to offer gift
will just come from
this side,
You can queue up

Just put down
The present and fast move on
